details.test: Task 1: Buy two cheapest adult day tickets for next Saturday exhibition
Task 2: Apply for adult annual membership with two interest areas
Task 3: Save three N scale steam-era layouts (>=4 stars) to favorites
Task 4: Add three merch items under 20 and select standard shipping
Task 5: Book child beginner workshop next-month Saturday morning
Task 6: Create personal schedule with two non-overlapping talks on same day
Task 7: Setup recurring monthly $10 donation to Youth Projects fund
Task 8: Save free parking within 500m into visit notes
Task 9: Select used HO locomotive (50-100, good+) from marketplace and add to cart
